'''Barpine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with [[Barpine Shipyards|shipyards]] used as the headquarters of the rogue [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lon Donell]]. Donell engaged in [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] from the bridge of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Detainer]]'', of which Donell had usurped command. The surface of the planet contained a large [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Barpine prison facility|facility]] for the crews of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that Donell captured. Barpine was located in the [[Barpine system/Legends|Barpine system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
